understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level of the KA59 puzzle by moving selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. The game reported WIN when every goal was occupied.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces could be moved using MOVE actions or by CLICKing a target position. MOVE actions moved the piece one step in that direction, while CLICK attempted to move the piece directly to the clicked coordinates. Movement was blocked by walls or obstacles, and the piece would not move if the path or destination was invalid. Selection remained on the same piece until a new one was chosen or the level was completed. The step budget was limited per level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level of the KA59 puzzle by moving selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. The game reported WIN when every goal was occupied.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces could be moved using MOVE actions or by CLICKing a target position. MOVE actions moved the piece one step in that direction, while CLICK attempted to move the piece directly to the clicked coordinates. Movement was blocked by walls or obstacles, and the piece would not move if the path or destination was invalid. Selection remained on the same piece until a new one was chosen or the level was completed. The step budget was limited per level.
